# `EvalSuite` manifest

Reference for `kind: EvalSuite` (apiVersion `vais.agents/v1`). Authoring schema: [`EvalSuite.schema.json`](../schemas/EvalSuite.schema.json).

## Example

```yaml
apiVersion: vais.agents/v1
kind: EvalSuite
metadata:
  id: example-suite
  version: "1.0"
  description: Example eval suite.
spec:
  agentId: example-agent
  cases:
  - id: greets
    input: Say hello.
    assertions:
    - kind: contains
      params:
        value: hello
  replayMode: Live
```

| `spec.agentId` | string | no | Optional id of the target agent to invoke for each case. Mutually exclusive with GraphId. |
| `spec.graphId` | string | no | Optional id of the target graph to invoke for each case. Mutually exclusive with AgentId. |
| `spec.target` | object | no | Structured target reference. When present, takes precedence over AgentId / GraphId. |
| `spec.target.agentRef` | string | no | Agent id to invoke. Mutually exclusive with GraphRef. |
| `spec.target.graphRef` | string | no | Graph id to invoke. Mutually exclusive with AgentRef. |
| `spec.target.agentVersion` | string | no | Specific agent manifest version to pin. Snapshotted into eval_runs.target_version. |
| `spec.defaults` | object | no | Suite-level defaults applied to every case unless overridden. |
| `spec.defaults.judgeModel` | string | no | Model router alias used by JudgeScoreAssertion. Snapshotted into eval_runs.judge_model. |
| `spec.defaults.timeout` | string | no | Per-case timeout. Null means no suite-level timeout. |
| `spec.baseline` | object | no | Baseline run to diff against in vais eval diff. |
| `spec.baseline.runId` | string | no | The eval run id of the baseline. |
| `spec.cases` | array&lt;object&gt; | no | Test cases that make up this suite (batch mode). Exactly one of Cases or Sampling must be set. Null when Sampling is present. |
| `spec.cases[].id` | string | no | Stable case identifier, unique within the suite. |
| `spec.cases[].name` | string | no | Human-readable case name. |
| `spec.cases[].description` | string | no | Human-readable case description. |
| `spec.cases[].input` | string | no | User-turn input text sent to the agent or graph. |
| `spec.cases[].variables` | map&lt;string, any&gt; | no | Optional structured variables for graph invocations (key = state field name). |
| `spec.cases[].expectedOutput` | string | no | Optional expected output text for exact-match assertions. |
| `spec.cases[].initialHistory` | array&lt;object&gt; | no | Optional conversation history injected before the input turn. |
| `spec.cases[].initialHistory[].role` | string | no | Role label â€” "user", "assistant", or "system". |
| `spec.cases[].initialHistory[].content` | string | no | Turn content text. |
| `spec.cases[].replay` | enum: `Live` \| `Cached` | no | Per-case replay mode override. Null means use suite-level ReplayMode. |
| `spec.cases[].assertions` | array&lt;object&gt; | no | Assertion list evaluated against the agent/graph response. Empty list means "no assertions, record only". |
| `spec.cases[].assertions[].kind` | string | no | Assertion kind string, matched against registered IEvalAssertionKindRegistry entries. |
| `spec.cases[].assertions[].params` | any | no | Optional JSON parameters for the assertion implementation. |
| `spec.replayMode` | enum: `Live` \| `Cached` | no | Suite-level replay mode default. Per-case Replay overrides this. Default: Live. |
| `spec.sampling` | object | no | Continuous-mode sampling configuration. When set, exactly one of Cases or Sampling must be present. Mutually exclusive with Cases. |
| `spec.sampling.rate` | number | no | Probability in [0, 1] that any one completed production run is scored. |
| `spec.sampling.minPerHour` | integer | no | Target minimum samples per hour. Best-effort hint in v1 â€” strict floor is a follow-on. |
| `spec.sampling.windowDuration` | string | no | Length of the rolling eval_runs window. Default 1 hour. |
| `spec.assertions` | array&lt;object&gt; | no | Suite-level assertion list used when Sampling is set (continuous mode). Each sampled production run is evaluated against all assertions here. Must be non-empty when Sampling is present. |
| `spec.assertions[].kind` | string | no | Assertion kind string, matched against registered IEvalAssertionKindRegistry entries. |
| `spec.assertions[].params` | any | no | Optional JSON parameters for the assertion implementation. |
